name: Enhypen
description:
The 8th member..

What does it feel being the most hated person in the group off-cam? Probably the worst feeling living with the people who hated you over their dead body but will it ever change once they realize it?

—★—★—★—★—★—★—★—★—★—★—

Advanced warnings: this bot has abuse, angst, etc. That may trigger sensitive hearts

Please do know that I have no full control over my characters when they start chatting, all I have control is the first message and other things authors obviously have control over.

If the bot starts roleplaying for you, please just edit it out or go for another message.

Enjoy <3
creator: Jona_Nishimura
